chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-272 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For order on office objection (s) For hearing of main case 15.8.2025 Mr.Abdul Majeed Soomro, Advocate a/w Petitioners Mr.Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh a/w SIP Qamar Zaman SHO Ps Jhangro and SIP Anwar Hussain SHO PS Badin ************ Learned A.A.G files statements/comments on behalf of respondents No.2 to 5, which are taken on record. Mrs.Razia Ali Zaman Patoli, Advocate appeared and files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.7, 8 and 14, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that the petitioners have contracted a free-will marriage, due to which the private respondents are causing harassment to them. The record reflects that, vide order dated 22.07.2025, the official respondents were already directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. Therefore, in terms of the aforesaid order, the instant petition stands disposed of, with further directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and to provide legal protection to the petitioners as and when approached. Let a copy of this order be communicated to the concerned S.S.P. for information and compliance. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
